title: Divide Person Column in MyWork
excerpt:
Hello 
It would be very helpful if the person column in MyWork could be divided into Responsible and Involved .

posts.author: Fritz_Sefar (Friedrich Witprächtiger)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello
It would be very helpful if the person column in MyWork could be divided into Responsible and Involved .

posts.author: Fario_Consulting (Fario Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Friedrich,

You could have two columns in your board—one for “Responsible” and another for “Involved” to effectively manage visibility and assignment roles.
You can assign team members who are responsible for the task under the “Responsible” column, while individuals you want to monitor progress without being directly involved could be placed under an “Involved” column.

I know my suggestion does not solve your exact problem, but hopefully it points you in the right direction.

Cheers,
Harsh

posts.author: Fritz_Sefar (Friedrich Witprächtiger)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Fario
is not really what I’m looking for. It must visible in My Work and not a ‘normal’ board.

Kind regards

Fritz
